_note: Synthetic expected.data authored per AUTHORING.md (ORACLE method): inputs taken from the upstream TTN examples (reference/upstream-examples.json), expected outputs derived by hand from the wire format documented in reference/upstream-codec.js and normalized to the vocabulary. The R730MBA upstream decoder only models device-info/battery/status (fPort 6) and config (fPort 7); the byte[4] status is the vibration alarm and maps to action.motion. Vectors cover action.motion.detected (true/false), action.motion.count, battery, the lowBattery extra, and several no-measurement frames reported as errors.

uplink.description: Vibration detected status report (battery 3.0 V, status 1)
No vibration status report (battery 3.0 V, status 0)
Vibration detected with multi-event count and low-battery flag (raw 0x80|30 = 158, status 5)
Configure report response on fPort 7 (no measurement)
